name: Rokgun
description: Fitting a Dahl barrel greatly cuts recoil but also worsens accuracy. On the Rokgun this does not come with the usual damage penalty, so it stays hard-hitting. It performs best up close, where you can hold the trigger and dump long bursts, making good use of its large magazine.
notes: Only appears at green rarity or above. Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source. A comparable Scav weapon in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the Shooter. Tags: Unique, E-tech, Legendary, Seraph, Pearlescent
